currentPhase.label: Set the foundation
currentPhase.outcome: A clear working identity and the next safe setup step.

phase.label: Set the foundation
phase.outcome: A clear working identity and the next safe setup step.

activeFounderGate.whatThisIs: Establish the founder-owned business identity that every account will use.
activeFounderGate.whyNow: It prevents scattered personal logins and makes later operator access revocable.
activeFounderGate.founderAction: Tell me the working business or app name you want to use; I will explain and handle the rest one step at a time.

question.prompt: Tell me the working business or app name you want to use; I will explain and handle the rest one step at a time.

options.label: Choose a name
options.description: Use a working name now so account and product research can stay organized.
options.consequence: The name remains provisional until collision and storefront checks are complete.
options.agentActionNext: Inspect current repo and public identity state, then guide the first secure business account step.
options.evidenceEffect: The business identity gate can move forward with a clearly provisional name.

options.label: Decide later
options.description: Keep the name open while the agent continues work that does not depend on public identity.
options.consequence: Account creation and public naming remain blocked, but reversible product inspection continues.
options.agentActionNext: Continue repo and product-state inspection without creating identity-bound accounts or public assets.
options.evidenceEffect: The identity lane remains partial and cannot be used as launch-ready proof.

bypassPolicy.reason: A working name can be deferred because private, reversible discovery does not depend on it.
bypassPolicy.fallbackAction: Continue private product and repo discovery without creating identity-bound accounts.
bypassPolicy.revisitTrigger: Before creating public accounts, buying a domain, or locking store metadata.

activeFounderGate.safeWorkWhileWaiting: Continue read-only repo and product-state inspection; do not infer consent or create public identity assets.
activeFounderGate.agentActionNext: Inspect current repo and public identity state, then guide the first secure business account step.
activeFounderGate.successProof: Business identity and the next account are recorded in BUSINESS_ACCESS.md and this ledger.

founderModel.nextFounderAction: Tell me the working business or app name you want to use; I will explain and handle the rest one step at a time.
founderModel.nextAgentAction: Inspect current repo and public identity state, then guide the first secure business account step.
founderModel.nextBusinessOperation: After the identity gate clears, continue into secure account setup, research, social profiles, content, support, analytics, store work, and launch operations in priority order.

doppler.nextFounderAction: Approve Doppler setup or complete the browser login when the agent opens it; never paste a token in chat.
doppler.nextAgentAction: Refresh official docs and CLI help, verify authentication, then inventory or create the business project and configs.

accounts.nextFounderAction: Confirm whether a founder-owned business email already exists.
accounts.nextAgentAction: Guide creation or secure the existing account, then use it for business assets.

accounts.purpose: Public identity, email, landing, and verification
accounts.nextFounderAction: Approve a domain purchase only after the agent checks the working name and availability.
accounts.nextAgentAction: Research availability and prepare the narrow purchase/DNS step when needed.

accounts.platform: Apple Developer and App Store Connect
accounts.purpose: iOS ownership, TestFlight, and App Store distribution
accounts.nextFounderAction: Confirm whether an Apple Developer account exists when iOS distribution is in scope.
accounts.nextAgentAction: Inspect ASC access, explain any enrollment gate, and continue the store setup.

accounts.purpose: Android distribution and YouTube ownership spine
accounts.nextFounderAction: Confirm the founder-controlled Google account when Android or YouTube is in scope.
accounts.nextAgentAction: Inspect Play/YouTube access and guide the next role or enrollment step.

accounts.purpose: Organic distribution, customer conversation, and support
accounts.nextFounderAction: Confirm whether the business already has an X account; the agent will handle the rest.
accounts.nextAgentAction: Inventory or create the account and prefer X Delegate over a shared password.

accounts.purpose: Instagram/Facebook organic distribution, support, and approved ads
accounts.nextFounderAction: Confirm whether Instagram, a Facebook Page, or a Meta Business Portfolio already exists.
accounts.nextAgentAction: Inventory or create the assets and request only the task/business access needed.

accounts.purpose: Short-form organic distribution and approved campaigns
accounts.nextFounderAction: Confirm whether a TikTok account or Business Center already exists.
accounts.nextAgentAction: Inventory or create it and prefer a Standard member role with assigned assets.

accounts.purpose: Product demos, education, launch video, and support
accounts.nextFounderAction: Confirm whether a business YouTube channel already exists.
accounts.nextAgentAction: Inventory or create the channel and use channel permissions instead of sharing the Google password.
